extension.description: Download and install add-ons from the official repository for add-ons of Doemela.[CR] Install this repository to receive automatic updates for:[CR][CR] • Clock Overlay, A lightweight Python-based clock that displays a temporary overlay during media playback.[CR] • WireGuard Manager NordVPN, High-performance VPN manager for LibreELEC. Uses NordLynx for maximum speed with an automated Systemd watchdog to prevent connection drops.[CR][CR]All add-ons on this repository have under gone basic testing, if you find a broken or not working add-on please report it so we can take any action needed.
extension.news:
v2.0.9 - Several changes to addons in this repository.
v2.0.8 - fixed update_repo, _repo_xml_generator
v2.0.7 - changelog append failed last time fixed... I hope...

extension.description: A lightweight Python-based clock that displays a temporary overlay during media playback.[CR] [B][COLOR yellow]Features:[/COLOR][/B] • [B]Shortcut:[/B] Press [I]0[/I] during playback. • [B]Customizable:[/B] Change duration and opacity in settings.
extension.news:
v1.7.8 - resize of screenshot00000
v1.7.7 - Cleaned up files and new icons

extension.summary: Hardened NordVPN WireGuard Manager for Raspberry Pi 5
extension.description: High-performance VPN manager for LibreELEC. Uses NordLynx for maximum speed with an automated Systemd watchdog to prevent connection drops.[CR][CR][B]Note:[/B] This addon is designed specifically for the LibreELEC filesystem and will not work on standard Android or Windows Kodi installations.[CR][CR][B]Features:[/B][CR]• WireGuard Native (NordLynx)[CR]• Smart Watchdog & Auto-Regen[CR]• Hard Reset Routing Tables[CR][CR][B]Disclaimer:[/B] Not an official NordVPN product. Use at your own risk. This addon is provided "as is" without warranty. The developer is not liable for data loss or security breaches. Full disclaimer available in addon settings.
extension.news:
v1.2.3 (2026-04-24)
- Added deep-flush file writing to ensure the reconnection counter is never corrupted. - Implemented a lock system to prevent the Monitor Service from fighting the Reconnect Helper. - Increased DHCP stabilization buffers and added a "proven connection" check before resetting counters. - Optimized log levels (INFO/WARNING/ERROR) and added DEBUG heartbeats to show "Shield Active" status. - Re-engineered the Helper to handle all 10 attempts internally for faster, more stable recovery.
v1.2.2 (2026-04-22) - FIX: Resolved ValueError: too many values to unpack in service.py. - FIX: Resolved IndentationError in vpn_ops.py gateway restoration logic. - FIX: Optimized Watchdog/Helper synchronization to prevent reconnect loops/spam. - NEW: Centralized all timing and delays into vpn_config.py for Pi 5 optimization. - NEW: Added DHCP Recovery delay to ensure internet restoration after VPN drops. - IMPROVED: Refined Auto-Cleanup timing in service_startup.py to match the 1s heartbeat.
